step_description: Deadlock event summary from Extended Events
narrative_hint: 8 deadlocks in the last hour, all involving the Orders table between OrderService sessions. This is a high-frequency, repeating deadlock cycle — not a one-time event. The pattern of two app_user sessions from the same application (OrderService) deadlocking on Orders is classic: the application is updating Orders in different row orders in concurrent transactions. The SSRS_Reports deadlock on OrderItems is a separate, lower-frequency issue. Claude should focus on the Orders deadlock cycle as the primary problem and request the detailed chain to identify the exact resource conflict.
